issue: haus.global-engineering-rules and haus.code-reviewer-agent are tagged as catalog defaults (always installed) but ship with confidenceLevel: "low" in every fixture. "low" is misleading for items that the recommender selects by policy as universally relevant baselines.
expected: Default-baseline items should either (a) be promoted out of the confidence band entirely with selectionMode: "baseline" carrying the trust signal, or (b) earn confidenceLevel: "medium" when selectionMode is baseline.
rootCauseHypothesis: default-baseline contributes only +25 to score, mapping to confidence 0.25 ("low") via the 0.4/0.75 bands. The bands were tuned for matched rules and never adjusted for baselines.
